---
applyTo: "**/*"
description: "Architecture documentation and Mermaid diagram currency"
---

# Architecture Documentation Currency

For architecture-affecting changes, invoke `$keep-architecture-docs-current` from `.github/skills/keep-architecture-docs-current/SKILL.md` before completion.

Architecture-affecting changes include workflow contracts, .NET modernization workflow code, GitHub custom agents, Agent Skills, hooks, MCP configuration, AgentV evals, CI, repository structure, package scripts, and durable process guidance.

When any of those surfaces change, update affected docs and Mermaid diagrams in the same change. Describe implemented behavior as current state, and label ideas or not-yet-built tools as roadmap.
